name: Asparagus Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound asparagus, cut into one-inch lengths (tips reserved)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly simmer the asparagus (excluding tips) in 3 cups of chicken stock for at least 30 minutes but preferably 1 hour.
2. Blend until smooth, using 1 cup of stock to rinse the blender.
3. If the asparagus is woody, strain through a fine-mesh strainer.
4. Add butter or cream if desired, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve and enjoy.
Note: Homemade stock yields the best results, but homemade stock, canned stock, and even bouillon can be used successfully. This recipe does not work well with pre-cut canned asparagus.
